headline: Truist culls some consumer loans, cites long-term strategy
summary: The Charlotte, North Carolina-based bank stopped originating marine and recreational vehicle loans during the second quarter. Executives said the change will reduce net interest income in the short term, but deliver higher profitability over the long run.

headline: Truist Financial’s (NYSE:TFC) Q2 CY2026 Sales Top Estimates
summary: Financial services company Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) reported Q2 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 4.3% year on year to $5.27 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.23 per share was 13.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
